title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch.
fullDescription: This comprehensive bootcamp takes you from an absolute beginner to a capable full-stack developer. You will build responsive websites and dynamic applications, understanding the core principles of how the web works behind the scenes.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master Figma, wireframing, and modern design principles.
fullDescription: Bridge the gap between design and development. This course focuses on creating intuitive user experiences and high-fidelity prototypes using Figma. You will learn color theory, typography, and how to hand off designs to developers.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Deep dive into data analysis, Pandas, and predictive modeling.
fullDescription: Harness the power of Python to analyze massive datasets. You will learn how to clean data, visualize trends, and build your first machine learning models to predict future outcomes based on historical data.

title: Digital Marketing 101: SEO & Social Media
description: Grow your audience with proven strategies in SEO and social marketing.
fullDescription: Learn how to drive organic traffic to your websites and build a loyal audience. This course covers everything from keyword research and technical SEO to running profitable ad campaigns on modern social platforms.
curriculum: Module 4: Content Creation for Social Media

title: Advanced React & Next.js Patterns
description: Build scalable web applications using React and Next.js.
fullDescription: Take your frontend skills to the next level. We dive deep into React hooks, context API, and Next.js App Router. You will learn server-side rendering, static site generation, and how to build blazing fast, SEO-friendly applications.
curriculum: Module 2: State Management Context vs Redux

title: Machine Learning A-Z
description: Learn algorithms, neural networks, and AI fundamentals hands-on.
fullDescription: Demystify Artificial Intelligence. This course breaks down complex algorithms into easily understandable concepts. You will train models to recognize images, understand text, and make automated decisions.
curriculum: Module 3: Decision Trees and Random Forests

title: Graphic Design Bootcamp
description: Learn Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign to create stunning graphics.
fullDescription: Explore the industry-standard tools for visual design. You will learn vector illustration, photo manipulation, and layout design, culminating in a professional portfolio of logos, posters, and digital assets.
curriculum: Module 5: Preparing Files for Print and Web

title: iOS App Development with Swift
description: Create native Apple applications using Swift and Xcode.
fullDescription: Build beautiful, native applications for the iPhone and iPad. You will master the Swift programming language, work with SwiftUI to build responsive interfaces, and learn how to publish your app to the App Store.
curriculum: Module 1: Introduction to Xcode and Swift
Module 4: Fetching API Data via URLSession

title: Tailwind CSS Mastery
description: Rapidly build modern websites without ever leaving your HTML.
fullDescription: Stop writing custom CSS files. Learn how to use utility classes to build completely custom designs faster than ever. We cover responsive design, dark mode, and extracting reusable components.
curriculum: Module 1: Setting up Tailwind in Next.js
Module 5: Building a Complete Dashboard UI

title: Financial Modeling for Startups
description: Learn how to build financial projections and calculate burn rate.
fullDescription: Understand the numbers behind the business. You will learn how to read balance sheets, forecast revenue, and model different growth scenarios to secure funding from investors.
curriculum: Module 4: Calculating Runway and Burn Rate

title: Ethical Hacking Fundamentals
description: Learn penetration testing and how to protect digital assets.
fullDescription: Think like a hacker to secure your systems. You will learn how to identify vulnerabilities in web applications, secure networks against attacks, and implement proper authentication methods like Argon2 and Bcrypt.

title: Photography Masterclass
description: Understand lighting and composition to take breathtaking photos.
fullDescription: Master your camera in manual mode. We cover the exposure triangle (aperture, shutter speed, ISO), natural lighting techniques, and the fundamentals of editing raw photos in Adobe Lightroom.

title: Relational Databases with PostgreSQL
description: Upgrade your data skills by mastering SQL and database architecture.
fullDescription: Learn how to store, retrieve, and manage data efficiently. You will write complex SQL queries, design relational schemas, and understand the importance of indexing for fast application performance.

title: Modern JavaScript Deep Dive
description: Master ES6+, closures, async/await, and the event loop.
fullDescription: Go beyond the basics. This course explains how JavaScript truly works under the hood. You will master asynchronous programming, prototype delegation, and functional programming concepts.
curriculum: Module 1: Execution Context and the Call Stack

title: Social Media Marketing Pro
description: Create viral content and manage online communities.
fullDescription: Build a powerful personal or corporate brand online. Learn platform-specific strategies for TikTok, Instagram, and LinkedIn, including video editing tips and community management workflows.

title: Intro to Cloud Computing with AWS
description: Deploy your first scalable applications to the cloud.
fullDescription: Move your applications from local servers to the global cloud. You will learn how to configure EC2 instances, manage S3 storage buckets, and set up load balancers for high availability.

title: 3D Animation with Blender
description: Create stunning 3D models, textures, and cinematic animations.
fullDescription: Bring your imagination to life. This hands-on course teaches you poly-modeling, UV mapping, rigging, and rendering high-quality 3D animations using the open-source Blender software.

title: Computer Vision Basics
description: Learn object detection and image classification with YOLO.
fullDescription: Train computers to see and understand the world. You will work with datasets to train models using YOLOv8, classifying objects like vehicles, pedestrians, and traffic signs in real-time video feeds.

title: Agile Project Management
description: Master Scrum methodologies to lead development teams efficiently.
fullDescription: Deliver software faster and more reliably. You will learn the roles, events, and artifacts of the Scrum framework, how to write user stories, and how to facilitate sprint planning and retrospectives.
curriculum: Module 3: Backlog Grooming and User Stories

title: Full-Stack Web Architect
description: Design and build enterprise-grade web applications.
fullDescription: Learn how to structure massive web applications. We cover system design, choosing the right databases, implementing secure authentication, and optimizing frontend performance for millions of users.
